meaning: identified flying object 已识别的飞行物
examples: Construction of Ifo II camp began shortly after.
In Germany the Ifo index, a gauge of business confidence, has sunk to a five-year trough.
An index of business confidence published by Ifo, a Munich research firm, jumped to a three-year high in October.
The Ifo business confidence index dropped to 106.7 in March from 107.4 in February.
German business sentiment rose to a seven-month high in January, the Ifo institute said on Friday.
